series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records generally associated with the creation, performance, and administration of trust funds for the long-term treatment of water adversely affected by coal mining, and includes, but is not limited to: trust agreements, administrative orders, escrow agreements, financial and accounting calculations and records, evaluation and performance records, valuations, water monitoring data, maps, and funding and expenditures from the corpus.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Paper records be retained five years termination of trust ; Electronic: Electronic records retained five years termination of trust
